headline: How Caesars’ Las Vegas Reinvestment And Bundled Pricing Push At CZR Has Changed Its Investment Story
summary: Caesars Entertainment has begun transforming The Cromwell on the Las Vegas Strip into The Vanderpump Hotel and, in a separate move, launched an Inclusive Summer Package at Harrah’s Las Vegas, The LINQ Hotel and Flamingo Las Vegas, bundling rooms, meals, drinks and attractions for stays through August 2026. These initiatives highlight Caesars’ push to refresh key Strip assets while testing bundled pricing to deepen guest spending across its Las Vegas portfolio. We’ll now examine how Caesars’...
